HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT TONY LAPSHINOFF'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. TONY A. LAPSHINOFF HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: DLOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR #4280 (206)

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT TONY LAPSHINOFF'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. LAPSHINOFF HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: DLOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR #4280 (206)
